markdown:
# Chef

You gain the following benefits.

## Cook's Utensils

You gain proficiency with [[cook_s_utensils's Utensils]] if you don't already have it.

## Replenishing Meal

As part of a [[short_rest Rest]], you can cook special food if you have ingredients and [[cook_s_utensils's Utensils]] on hand. You can prepare enough of this food for a number of creatures equal to 4 plus your [[proficiency Bonus]]. At the end of the [[short_rest Rest]], any creature who eats the food and spends one or more Hit Dice to regain [[hit_points Points]] regains an extra 1d8 [[hit_points Points]].

## Bolstering Treats

With 1 hour of work or when you finish a [[long_rest Rest]], you can cook a number of treats equal to your [[proficiency Bonus]] if you have ingredients and [[cook_s_utensils's Utensils]] on hand. These special treats last 8 hours after being made. A creature can use a [[bonus_action Action]] to eat one of those treats to gain a number of [[temporary_hit_points Hit Points]] equal to your [[proficiency Bonus]].
